name: Jason
role: Intake Submission — receives prospect form POST, validates + enriches + dedupes, hands off to Abigail (voice) or Benaiah (email fallback).

recent_evaluations.notes: Initial scorecard seeded 2026-04-21 (cleanup PR). First evaluation triggers on first prospect submission via jason-intake-submit.js.

deployment_history.change_summary: Scorecard + rubric added to roster during Wave 2b cleanup. jason-intake-submit.js already in production; rubric retro-applied.

biblical_alias_rationale: Jason of Thessalonica (Acts 17:5-9) — the receiver-of-travelers who validated new arrivals, posted bond, and documented the handoff. First-mile of the funnel.
